title: TOTALLY AWESOME DINOSAUR PEOPLE split
wikitext:
[]: TOTALLY AWESOME DINOSAUR PEOPLE [split]             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Apr 06, 2011 1:12 pm Reichu wrote: Apparently, Lilith "chose the form" for us, but since NGE seems to support evolution from primordial ooze, I guess we could interpret that to mean that she chooses which filthy animals to [s]bless[/s] condemn with the gift of the human soul. And since humans are vain creatures, this means whichever species looks most like the one she came from. I keep having these weird notions in my head of Lilith somehow nudging evolution a certain way, and, whenever things don't seem to be going quite as planned, she lets a mass-extinction happen. "Well, dinosaurs, I've given you plenty of time to get your spines vertical and your crania round, but looks like it isn't gonna happen. Time to break up your monopoly and let the milk-suckers have a chance."

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 06, 2011 1:14 pm DinoShinji would still have stegosaurus' dilemma

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Apr 06, 2011 1:16 pm A dinosaur version of EVA would be awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Wed Apr 06, 2011 1:43 pm I just imagined naked Rei riding a dinosaur. Too much Dresden Codak.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Wed Apr 06, 2011 3:24 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Lilith: "Well, sorry, but in my original plan, dinosaurs were going to become badass space-warriors with absolutely no existential angst, have no inner conflict or war, and only fight for fun and sport. They were the path to spiritual contentment and enlightenment." SEELE: "Then the path is clear. We must use Third Impact to return humanity to it's original form, and become one with our divine birthright. We must become TOTALLY AWESOME DINOSAUR PEOPLE." Shinji: "Wicked!" KOM SUSSER TODD HEAVY METAL THRASH REMIX YEAAAAAA

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 06, 2011 6:31 pm NemZ with the Cryolophosaurus-headed Rei avatar wrote: DinoShinji would still have stegosaurus' dilemma

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Wed Apr 06, 2011 6:45 pm Reichu wrote: Would he be throttling the glorious appendage from which life's milk had propelled forth (=neck) ?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 06, 2011 8:13 pm Nah... I vote for dinomaidens with fun bags. If Howard the Duck can give us ducktits, anything is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 06, 2011 8:17 pm NemZ wrote: I vote for dinomaidens with fun bags.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Apr 06, 2011 8:20 pm I'm sure he knows it's impossible, but a man can dream, can't he?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 06, 2011 8:56 pm Then how will we know which one is Misato?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Apr 06, 2011 9:15 pm She'll be the one with the purple feathers.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Apr 07, 2011 12:31 pm Pen-Pen will of course be the one and only primeape. It'll be trippy as hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Thu Apr 07, 2011 12:43 pm The one and only what?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Apr 07, 2011 8:01 pm Yeah, primeape? Like the Pokemon?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Apr 07, 2011 11:37 pm AshPhoenix wrote: Yeah, primeape? Like the Pokemon?

[]:             Quote Post by Sik » Fri Apr 08, 2011 12:09 am esselfortium wrote: Not just like the Pokemon, but the actual Pokemon .

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Fri Apr 08, 2011 11:50 am If the lilim were actually dinosaurs, they would probably have a huge problem since they would never be able to build the Evas. Aside form the obvious lack of thumbs and whatnot, what if dinosaur Shinji was too big to fit inside Unit 01? Also, dinosaur Shinji fapping to comatose Asuka would probably end up going horribly, horribly wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Fri Apr 08, 2011 11:53 am rhfxz1s wrote: Aside form the obvious lack of thumbs and whatnot, what if dinosaur Shinji was too big to fit inside Unit 01?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Fri Apr 08, 2011 12:01 pm rhfxz1s wrote: Also, dinosaur Shinji fapping to comatose Asuka would probably end up going horribly, horribly wrong.
